entry.title: 115 000 € Terreno Urbano -1170 M2 - Construção - Vale da Telha-Aljezur -Algarve (Century 21)

entry.title: € 900.000 Homestead 3 bedrooms Alfaçal Aljezur - electricity, terrace, equipped, kitchen, cork oaks, water (Provenda)
entry.content: SaleSítio de Paz is a rare and authentic Algarve estate, just 8 km from the beach, with a main house in taipa of about 144sqm, semi-detached, an independent accommodation unit, three warehouses with development potential and an orchard of fig and pomegranate trees, vegetable garden, pine and cork trees. With connections to public networks, fiber optic internet and infrastructure for horses, just five minutes from Aljezur, this is a truly special property for those seeking space, nature and tranquility. Hidden among the serene nature of the Alentejo-Algarve coast, the Sítio de Paz property represents a truly rare opportunity: an authentic retreat, just 8 km from the beaches and amenities of the neighboring villages, where privacy, tranquility and natural beauty coexist in perfect harmony. It is built according to the ancestral technique of the taipa, compacted clay that guarantees natural isolation and an atmosphere of freshness in summer and coziness in winter. With a living area of 144sqm, the main house offers a cozy interior organized around an open plan kitchen and living room, three bedrooms and a bathroom. The roof has been recently renovated with cork insulation and the window frames have also been replaced, ensuring maximum comfort without compromising the original character of the building. The privileged viewpoint of this house offers stunning and unobstructed views over the surrounding rural landscape, a spectacle that renews itself every hour of the day. Complementing the main house, there is an independent accommodation unit, designed to ensure total autonomy and privacy. With an equipped kitchen, living and sleeping area, bathroom and a mezzanine with additional accommodation capacity, this space opens directly to a private terrace through French glass doors. Ideal for receiving family and friends, exploring the potential of local accommodation, or simply offering independence to those who want to reside in the same space autonomously. The land surrounding the property is one of its most charming assets. An orchard with fig and pomegranate trees invites to harvest in the warmer months and a small garden offers the possibility of growing your own food, reinforcing the spirit of rural life and self-sufficiency. The land also has pines and cork trees, emblematic trees of the Algarve landscape that give shade, charm and a truly special natural setting to the property. The property also has three warehouses (approximately 85sqm, 21sqm and 16sqm, respectively), which offer multiple possibilities of use: storage, workshop, stables or spaces to be converted, subject to the appropriate licenses. There is even infrastructure already installed for horses, which opens doors to equestrian tourism projects or outdoor activities. With regard to utilities, the property has water and electricity from the municipal network, fiber optic internet and private parking, a combination that combines rural charm with contemporary convenience. Possibility of expanding the areas up to 300sqm for housing and 600sqm for Rural Tourism. Just 5 minutes from Aljezur, Rogil and Amoreira Beach, Sítio de Paz is situated in a perfect balance: close to everything that is essential, but completely surrounded by natural landscape, the silence is deep, the views reach the horizon in all directions and the feeling of being truly out of the world is a constant. Whether as a permanent family residence, retreat, rural tourism project or long-term investment, Sítio de Paz is one of those properties that rarely appear on the market, for those looking for space, authenticity and the genuine Algarve lifestyle, this is simply an opportunity that does not repeat itself.

entry.title: € 890.000 Farm 3 bedrooms Bordeira Aljezur - furnished, alarm, equipped, terrace, fireplace, store room (Provenda)
entry.content: SaleProperty consisting of three bedrooms, two bathrooms, cozy living room, functional kitchen and fireplace. It is furnished and equipped with underfloor heating, alarm system and storage. Outside it has a well-kept garden area, terrace, pergola and dining area, ideal for leisure moments. The property also includes a small ruin with potential for reconstruction, offering an additional opportunity for valorization. This house was completely rebuilt by an interior architect, designed with a focus on comfort, simplicity and a welcoming atmosphere, creating a space where the rhythm of life becomes naturally calmer and more harmonious.

entry.title: € 345.000 House 1 bedrooms Bordeira Aljezur (Provenda)
entry.content: SaleThis house combines authentic Algarve charm with a modern, relaxed touch. Completely rebuilt, the property is spread over three floors connected by a stone staircase and features whitewashed interiors, custom-made wooden furniture and natural textiles that create a serene and bright atmosphere. With a bedroom, a bathroom and a living room, a fully equipped kitchen and a patio facing the street, it is the perfect refuge for those who appreciate the simplicity of village life. Here, time slows down and every detail invites you to relax. Just 10 minutes from the wild beaches of the Costa Vicentina, such as Praia da Bordeira and Carrapateira. Close to Aljezur and around 30 km from Sagres and Lagos, it offers the perfect balance between rural tranquility and easy access to the coast.

entry.title: € 840.000 Farm 2+1 bedrooms Perdigão Rogil Aljezur - electricity, equipped, water, terrace, terraces, air conditioning, kitchen, water hole, garden (Provenda)
entry.content: SaleProperty with a housing, located in the middle of nature, in a quiet and private zone, surrounded by pine trees and also many other tree species, as well as a garden. It is easily accessible, with private path, parking zone, terraces and pérgulas, providing various leisure zones. House in a position to be inhabited, with equipped kitchen, heating, air conditioning, electricity and water from the network and borehole. Possibility of expanding the construction area.

entry.title: € 650.000 Farm 5 bedrooms Chaparral Bordeira Aljezur - cork oaks (Provenda)
entry.content: SaleProperty located in a Natural Park, about 2.3 km from Vale Figueiras Beach in Aljezur. With two ruins to rebuild, one of which has an approved architectural project for a 200 m² semi-detached house. This property benefits from an exceptional landscape setting, naturally attractive for its unique forest diversity – pine trees, cork oaks, arbutus trees, orchards and vegetable gardens. Property with diverse natural attractions, including a lake and/or potential for a tourism project.

entry.title: € 1.050.000 House Tramelo Bordeira Aljezur - swimming pool, garden (Provenda)
entry.content: SaleSet of 3 Houses with Pool and Land Ideal for tourist investment or housing its own performance In the heart of the Vincentina coast in Tremel (Bordeira), it finds this exclusive set of 3 independent houses, inserted on 2,326sqm with pool and large outdoor spaces. Surrounded by the tranquility of the natural park and a few minutes of the most beautiful beaches in the region, this is the perfect place for those looking for a refuge in nature or an investment project or an investment Versatile. Property Characteristics Total Terrain Area: 2,326sqm 3 Housing License Housing: House A - Private Land: 229.88sqm - built area: 72sqm mezzanine 60sqm (2 floors) House B - Private Land: 186sqm - built area: 72sqm mezzanine 60sqm (2 floors) House C - Private Land: 143.4sqm (2 floors) Common areas: - Shared Pool - Outdoor parking - Garden and Evorming Patios (approx. 1,500sqm) Premium Location: - 10 min from the beaches of Arrifana, Mulberry and Monte Clérigo - In the heart of the natural park of the Vicentina - A 15 min from Aljezur (supermarkets, schools,) Potential: - Investment in Local Accommodation / Rural Tourism - Own residence with possibility of performance (renting other houses) - House for families or groups seeking quality of life and nature Contact us for more information and to schedule your visit! This is a rare property in the region-don't miss the opportunity!

entry.title: € 545.000 Farm Corte de Sobro Rogil Aljezur - electricity, water (Provenda)
entry.content: SaleLocated on the Vicentina coast, with a total area of 7.09 hectares, it includes an old housing, a natural lake, a pond, panoramic views of the sea and the saw, just 4.5 km from Rogil, 7 km from Aljezur and 8 km from the beach. Electricity and water supply network are available on site, ensuring all essential conditions for housing or project development. The existing house has an implementation area of 195.8sqm and a useful area of 140.31sqm. There is a possibility of renewing, expansion or construction of a rural tourism project up to 2000sqm. With great agricultural potential is an opportunity to create a quiet refuge, a sustainable project or a lucrative rural business, this property offers what you are looking for!

entry.title: € 369.000 Farm Barranco da Figueira Aljezur - well, water, tank, cork oaks (Provenda)
entry.content: SaleDiscover a unique 65-hectare property in the Costa Vicentina Natural Park, just 10 minutes from Aljezur, featuring landscapes of valleys and hills covered with native cork oak and strawberry trees, abundant water resources (two wells, a stream, and a water tank), and a 55.5 m² ruin with approved plans for reconstruction. Equipped with a 6 kW solar system it offers energy independence and is ideal for agroforestry, permaculture projects, or as a private retreat, combining privacy, sustainability, and proximity to the beaches and the town.

entry.title: € 560.000 House in the countryside 3 bedrooms Valinhos Aljezur - equipped kitchen, garden, barbecue (Provenda)
entry.content: SaleT3 housing of traditional construction in mud, rehabilitated and in good condition. Fully furnished and ready to live, it is very close to the city center. Just 15 minutes from the beach, it offers the perfect balance between country life and access to all urban amenities. It has three bedrooms with private bathroom plus an additional supporting house, living room and kitchen equipped in open plane, pantry and tidy living room, garden, porch, barbecue, fruit trees, 4 garages, two holes, connection to the water network and electricity.

entry.title: € 420.000 Farm Aljezur - cork oaks, arable crop, water (Provenda)
entry.content: Sale3.16 hectare property located 3 km from the center of Aljezur and 7 km from the beaches. It has a construction area of 120sqm corresponding to an old house for reconstruction, classified as a legal ruin, thus offering several possibilities for renovation. The land is of mixed nature, with areas of arable culture and cork oaks. It has easy road access, connection to the electricity grid and on-site water supply. Ideal for those who want to develop a residential project, in an area with great potential.

entry.title: € 70.000 Land with 59000sqm Aljezur - cork oaks, electricity, water (Provenda)
entry.content: SaleThis land is located in Aljezur, close to Cerca dos Pomares. With 5.9 hectares of abundant nature, it has a riverbed, cork oaks, bush and fertile soil for agriculture. The electricity supply network is located next to the land.

entry.title: € 550.000 Hotel Aljezur - laundry (Provenda)
entry.content: SaleLocated in a beautiful area with easy access, approximately 8 km from Aljezur, this property is ideal for a nature retreat. It has prior approval for the construction of a resort-style hotel with dispersed units, comprising: 20 buildings, of which 15 are accommodation units/houses with a total area of ​​675sqm (45sqm/unit); 3 buildings for staff accommodation with a total area of ​​120sqm; 1 building for common areas and services with 400sqm; 1 building for laundry, technical area and storage with 150sqm. The project also includes a biological swimming pool, solar park and parking. Areas can be adjusted according to a new plan. The property has a wide variety of trees. Water is supplied via the public network and a borehole, and electricity and telecommunications are located close to the property. It is approximately 15 minutes from the beaches of Vale dos Homens and Amoreira, a 40-minute drive from Palmares Golf Course and approximately 90 minutes by car from Faro Airport.
